message:
fix(primitives): rename save_agent param to spec, add capabilities fallback

Rename the `yaml` parameter to `spec` for clarity since the parameter
accepts a YAML-formatted agent spec. Add backward-compatible fallback
so LLMs that still produce `capabilities` instead of separate `tools`
and `agents` arrays will still work correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
